move_legality_label: {tableau_rule_text} {foundation_rule_text} Which visible move option letter is legal?
{tableau_rule_text} {foundation_rule_text} Select the option letter for the legal move.
{tableau_rule_text} {foundation_rule_text} Which move option can be made now?
{tableau_rule_text} {foundation_rule_text} Identify the only legal source-to-target option.
{tableau_rule_text} {foundation_rule_text} Which option letter shows a legal solitaire move?
foundation_ready_count: {foundation_rule_text} How many exposed column cards can move to a foundation pile now?
{foundation_rule_text} Count the exposed column cards that are ready for a foundation.
{foundation_rule_text} What is the number of exposed column cards that can be moved to a foundation now?
{foundation_rule_text} How many exposed cards are legal foundation moves?
{foundation_rule_text} Count the exposed column cards whose suit and rank match a foundation move.
tableau_movable_card_count: {tableau_rule_text} How many exposed column cards have at least one legal column move?
{tableau_rule_text} Count the exposed column cards that can move onto another exposed column card.
{tableau_rule_text} What is the number of exposed column cards with at least one legal destination column?
{tableau_rule_text} How many exposed column cards can be moved to another column?
{tableau_rule_text} Count the exposed column cards that have a legal move between columns.
column_card_count: How many visible cards are in column {target_column_number}?
Count the visible cards in column {target_column_number}.
What is the number of visible cards in column {target_column_number}?
In column {target_column_number}, how many visible cards are shown?
How many cards can you see in column {target_column_number}?
cascade_card_at_depth_label: Which option shows the {target_depth_ordinal} visible card from the top of column {target_column_number}?
Look at column {target_column_number}. Which option is the {target_depth_ordinal} visible card from the top?
In column {target_column_number}, select the option matching the {target_depth_ordinal} visible card from the top.
Which labeled option matches the card at visible position {target_depth_ordinal} from the top of column {target_column_number}?
Find the {target_depth_ordinal} visible card from the top of column {target_column_number}. Which option shows that card?

code_prompt_defaults.tableau_rule_text: For moves between columns, a card can be placed on another column card only if the target is exactly one rank higher and the opposite color.
code_prompt_defaults.foundation_rule_text: A card can move to a foundation only if it matches that foundation suit and is exactly one rank above the foundation's current top card; an Ace can move to an empty foundation.
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_move_legality_label: set "annotation" to an object mapping "source_card" and "target" to their bounding boxes [x0, y0, x1, y1]
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_foundation_ready_count: set "annotation" to an array of bounding boxes [x0, y0, x1, y1] for the counted exposed cards; use an empty array when no cards are counted
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_tableau_movable_card_cou: set "annotation" to an array of bounding boxes [x0, y0, x1, y1] for every counted exposed column card; use an empty array when no cards are counted
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_column_card_count: set "annotation" to an array of [x, y] image-pixel points, one point on the visible part of each card in the requested column
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_cascade_card_at_depth_la: set "annotation" to one [x, y] image-pixel point on the visible part of the target card in the column
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_move_legality_label: set "answer" to only the visible move option letter, for example "C"
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_foundation_ready_count: set "answer" to the number of exposed column cards that can move to a foundation pile now
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_tableau_movable_card_count: set "answer" to the number of exposed column cards that have at least one legal column move
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_column_card_count: set "answer" to the number of visible cards in the requested column
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_cascade_card_at_depth_label: set "answer" to only the option letter showing the requested card
